title: Ebbert Lab Nanopore PCS111 brain cDNA discovery (12 samples - AD vs Controls)
author: Bernardo Aguzzoli Heberle
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
For more information about this data see the publication: https://doi.org/10.1038/s41587-024-02245-9 
 The publication GitHub is a good source of information: https://github.com/UK-SBCoA-EbbertLab/brain_cDNA_discovery 
 There are also README files in the data that provide more information about what is contained in each directory. 
   
 Basic information about main directory structure and files: 
 reproducing_RNA_figures - Contains all references/annotations necessary for reproducing the stats, analysis, and figures for the RNA isoform analysis in the article. 
 reproducing_nextflow_pipeline - Contains all references/annotations necessary for reproducing the NextFlow pipeline. 
 proteomics - Fasta reference files files used for proteomics analysis with FragPipe and results output by FragPipe. 
 transcriptomic_analysis_output - Contains output from transcriptomic analysis including: quality control, counts matrices, new RNA isoform annotations, and the Bambu R object. 
 counts_transcript.txt - Transcript level counts (does not include any intronic reads).
